notes: No force-fit detected. no — the kāmān manogatān (desires already lodged in the mind) framing is specific to 2.55; the contentment-source framing could not equally come from 2.47 (action-not-fruit) or 2.48 (settle-then-act). The analog specifically anchors on BG 2.55's unique vocabulary, not on a generic operator-doctrine that could equally come from any chapter-2 verse.
